article_title: UK heatwave delivers exceptional sunshine and persistent 30C temperatures

tasks.prompt: What is the main subject of the article?
options: A winter storm bringing snow across the UK
A long spell of strong sunshine and temperatures around or above 30C
A report about falling household energy prices
A guide to travelling during heavy rain
tasks.correct_answer: A long spell of strong sunshine and temperatures around or above 30C
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הכתבה עוסקת בגל חום מתמשך בבריטניה, עם הרבה שמש וטמפרטורות סביב 30 מעלות ומעלה.

tasks.prompt: Which weather system helps keep skies clear and temperatures high?
options: Persistent high pressure
A deep low-pressure system
A strong Atlantic storm
A cold polar front
tasks.explanation_hebrew: לחץ אוויר גבוה ומתמשך מעכב היווצרות עננים ותומך במזג אוויר יבש וחם.

tasks.prompt: Where can cloud remain longer even when inland areas become sunny?
options: Only over central London
Inside underground stations
Near some coastal areas
Across every inland valley
tasks.explanation_hebrew: הכתבה מסבירה שעננות יכולה להישאר סמוך לחופים בעוד שבפנים הארץ השמיים מתבהרים מהר יותר.

tasks.prompt: In the article, what does “consecutive” mean when describing hot days?
options: Days separated by several cold weeks
Days measured in different countries
Days with exactly the same wind speed
Days that come one after another without a break
tasks.correct_answer: Days that come one after another without a break
tasks.explanation_hebrew: המילה consecutive מתארת ימים רצופים שמגיעים בזה אחר זה.

tasks.prompt: Why does persistent high pressure usually produce more sunshine? Answer in 1–3 sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: High pressure suppresses or inhibits cloud formation
With fewer clouds, more sunshine reaches the ground
Clearer skies can help daytime temperatures rise

tasks.prompt: How may conditions differ between inland areas and some coasts during this hot spell? Answer in 1–3 sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Inland areas may become sunnier and hotter
Cloud or cooler air may linger near some coasts
The difference is linked to wind direction and local coastal effects

tasks.prompt: What is likely to happen as the easterly wind becomes weaker?
options: A major snowstorm will begin immediately
The heat may spread more widely across the UK
Temperatures will fall below freezing everywhere
The high-pressure system will turn into a hurricane
tasks.correct_answer: The heat may spread more widely across the UK
tasks.explanation_hebrew: כאשר הרוח המזרחית נחלשת, האוויר החם יכול להתפשט באופן רחב יותר.

tasks.prompt: Write a 50–80 word summary of the article without copying sentences.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: The UK is experiencing persistent sunshine and repeated temperatures near or above 30C
High pressure is limiting cloud formation
Coastal and inland conditions can differ
The hot and dry spell may continue or intensify before conditions change

tasks.prompt: Write 1–3 sentences explaining why several consecutive hot days can be more difficult than one isolated hot day.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Heat accumulates and gives people, homes, soil, and water systems less time to cool
Long duration can increase health, drought, or water-supply pressures
The explanation should connect duration with impact

tasks.prompt: Write a one-sentence headline-style summary that mentions both the cause and the result of the hot spell.
tasks.rubric_hebrew: התשובה צריכה להתבסס על פרטים אמיתיים מן הכתבה, להיות ברורה, ולא להעתיק משפטים שלמים.
expected_points: Mention widespread sunshine and temperatures around or above 30C
